lambda.function.snapstartresponse.ApplyO.Description: When set to `PublishedVersions`, Lambda creates a snapshot of the execution environment when you publish a function version.

lambda.function.snapstartresponse.Optimi.Description: When you provide a [qualified Amazon Resource Name (ARN)](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/lambda/latest/dg/configuration-versions.html#versioning-versions-using), this response element indicates whether SnapStart is activated for the specified function version.
